MINI MINUTES:

Peter Lynch (619-234-1700) of Cozen O'Connor for Petitioner, State Farm General Insurance Co.
Mark Sweeney for PG & E.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

PETITIONER STATE FARM GENERAL's Verified Petition To Perpetuate Testimony And Preserve, Inspect And Test Evidence:
Parties have stipulated to pretrial discovery; counsel to submit stipulation/proposed order to court for signature via email to Klgallo@discoveryreferee.com.
